mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOOK ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOOK ( BOOK_ID, TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, PUBLISH_DATE, CATEGORY, RANKING, REVIEW_COUNT, RATING, DESCRIPTION, PAGES, PRICE, BOOK_COVER ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOOK_ID.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, TO_DATE(#{publishDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{category}, #{ranking, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rating, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{pages, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bookCover, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE CATEGORY LIKE '%' || #{category} || '%' ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOK WHERE CATEGORY LIKE '%' || #{category} || '%'

SELECT * FROM BOOK
TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AUTHOR LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
CATEGORY LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC
